title: Add user authentication
body:
## Description
Implement user authentication system

## Requirements
- [ ] Login form
- [ ] Registration form
- [ ] Password reset

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can register with email/password
- Users can log in
- Sessions persist across page refreshes

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Code written
- [ ] Unit tests added
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated
